summary: On 2023-10-19, there was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for lisinopril, with 64 reports received compared to an expected 31.71 based on Holt-Winters forecasting.
notable_pattern: Reports from 2023-10-16 show a high frequency of hospitalization and life-threatening events, including sepsis, septic shock, and intestinal perforation, often in patients taking multiple medications.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any clinical conclusions can be drawn.
